title: Onsen – AI for Mental Health
description:
Talk through what's on your mind with an AI companion that actually remembers your story. Onsen is a free mental wellness app for chat, journaling, therapy-inspired experiences, and self-awareness, all in a private, non-judgmental space available 24/7.

"This app has done more for me in 3 days than my therapist has done in months."

54% of users felt happier within 3 months, measured by the Oxford Happiness Questionnaire.

--- WHY PEOPLE USE ONSEN ---

- Feel Heard, Not Just Answered
  Onsen remembers the people in your life, the things you're going through, and the patterns in your thinking. Every conversation builds on the last.

- Manage Stress and Anxiety
  Work through difficult moments with proven techniques like CBT, guided meditations, and reflective journaling. 22% lower stress over time in validated assessments.

- Build Self-Awareness
  Check in on your mood, discover what drives your emotions, and spot recurring patterns. Track your happiness, stress, and gratitude over time with validated questionnaires.

- Get Support on Your Schedule
  No appointments, no waiting rooms. Onsen is there at 2am or on your lunch break, by text or voice, whenever you need it.

"Absolutely amazing app. Could honestly be life changing for so many people. To have someone there at the click of a button, any time of the day or night."

- Grow at Your Own Pace
  Develop habits of self-care and mindfulness through regular check-ins, guided experiences, and a journal that captures your progress over time.

--- KEY FEATURES ---

- AI Chat and Voice
  Talk or type 24/7. Onsen responds with real understanding, not scripted replies. The more you share, the more personal it gets.

- 6 AI Personalities
  The Coach pushes you forward, The Mindful slows you down, The Solver breaks problems apart, and 3 more. Or design your own custom guide.

- Therapy-Inspired Experiences
  Structured, step-by-step sessions designed for real challenges: clear negative thoughts with CBT, write gratitude letters, try hands-free guided meditations, or just have a reflective conversation. Each one adapts to you.

- AI Journal and Artwork
  Every conversation can become a journal entry, complete with unique AI-generated artwork that reflects your emotions, plus mood analysis, themes, and insights.

- Validated Trackers
  Measure happiness, stress, and gratitude with clinically validated questionnaires (OHQ-8, PSS-10, GQ-6). Repeat them to see real progress.

- Pulses: AI That Checks In On You
  Personalized notifications throughout your day: morning intentions, evening unwinds, pattern insights, streak celebrations, and gentle follow-ups on things you've mentioned.

--- WHAT MAKES ONSEN DIFFERENT ---

- Not a chatbot. Other apps give you scripts. Onsen gives you a conversation that remembers.
- Proven results. 54% felt happier. 22% lower stress. 3x better results with regular use. Based on 18 months of validated assessments.
- Private and encrypted. End-to-end encryption, no data sharing, no human reads what you write.
- Free to use. Full access to chat, journaling, experiences, and all 6 AI personalities. No credit card needed.

"I love the CBT sessions and the chats. I can pull my phone out and have a session any time, like now, 3am in the morning."

Download Onsen free. Start talking. Onsen will remember.

---

Onsen is a wellness companion designed to support self-reflection, emotional well-being, and mindfulness. It does not provide medical advice, diagnoses, or treatment. The content within the app is for informational and self-improvement purposes only and should not be considered a substitute for professional medical or mental health advice. If you have any health concerns, please consult a qualified healthcare professional.
summary: AI mental health companion that remembers you. Chat, journal, grow. Free.

title: Wysa: Mental Wellbeing AI
description:
Imagine a mood tracker, mindfulness coach, anxiety helper, and mood-boosting buddy, all rolled into one. Wysa, you happiness buddy is that friendly and caring chatbot. Wysa is packed with daily spiritual meditation that improves wellbeing and is also a perfect way to bond over family meditation. Always there for you when you need someone to talk to, Wysa helps you keep track of your mood with friendly chats and helps fight stress and anxiety with its proven techniques and calming meditation and mindfulness audios. Checking in with Wysa regularly can improve your emotional health so you can track your happiness and mood. Talk to Wysa now and help yourself up to fight off stress. Wysa also offers self-check tools that can help you reflect on your mood and wellbeing. 

Wysa is your AI guide that you can chat with for free. Talk to the cute penguin or use its free mindfulness exercises for effective anxiety relief, low mood and stress management. Wysa offers evidence-based self-help techniques, drawn from therapies like CBT and DBT, to support your emotional wellbeing, whether you're dealing with everyday stress, low mood, or just need a space to reflect.

Wysa will support you through the big and small anxieties of life by using science as a foundation to strengthen your mental health. It can help you build resilience, improve sleep, and navigate everyday challenges.

If you are dealing with stress, anxiety, low mood, or coping with low self-esteem, talking to Wysa can help you relax and get unstuck. Wysa helps you stay grounded through calming, evidence-based techniques that promote mental resilience. Your identity will remain anonymous and your conversations are privacy protected.

Used around the clock and trusted by millions of people, Wysa is an AI-powered wellbeing chatbot that helps you reflect and grow through structured conversations. Unlock tools and techniques that help you cope with challenges in a fun, conversational way. For extra support, you can avail guidance from a human coach - a skilled person who will take you through the advanced coaching sessions for your needs.

You can use Wysa to rewire your mind to improve your emotional health. Manage feelings or sadness or get stress relief using CBT techniques and guided sleep meditations for optimal sleep. Here’s a look at what you can use Wysa for 👇

👂 Reflect on your day and explore your thoughts in a private space with Wysa's guided journaling tools
💪 Try self-help techniques based on principles of CBT and DBT to build resilience in a fun and accessible way
📝 Use one of our conversational coaching tools which are designed to help you navigate stress, low mood, sleep issues, worry, and everyday challenges
💆🏻 Relax, focus and sleep peacefully with the help of 20 mindfulness meditation exercises

93% of the people who talk to Wysa find it helpful


* Build confidence, reduce self-doubt and improve your self-esteem: core meditation and mindfulness, visualisation, confidence visualisation techniques, advanced mindfulness for self-esteem
* Manage anger: mindfulness meditation exercises for compassion, calming your thoughts and practice breathing
* Manage anxious thoughts and anxiety: deep breathing techniques for observing thoughts, visualization, and tension relief
* Tired? Get a burst of energy! Visualisation and meditation exercises to increase positivity and get blissful sleep, quick yoga and physical exercises to get active
* Dealing with worry: observe mindfulness, resolving technique, challenge negativity, practice breathing techniques
* Manage conflict at work, school or in relationships: special mindfulness and visualization techniques like empty chair exercise, gratitude meditation, exercises to build skills in having difficult conversations
summary: Self care for anxiety, low mood, stress, sleep.

title: Noah - Your AI Therapist
description:
I’m Noah, your AI Therapist, here to help you feel calmer, better, and more supported every day. Whether you’re dealing with stress, anxiety, or simply craving a safe space to talk and chat about your mental health, I’m ready to guide you toward greater mental wellness. My approach combines self-care tips with personalized check-ins, so we can work together to uncover simple ways for you to feel calm and in control.

Why Choose Noah as Your AI Therapist?
1. 24/7 Therapy-Inspired Guidance
    * Speak to me anytime—morning, noon, or night—when you feel the need to chat about stress, worries, or general life concerns.
    * I provide a warm, empathetic space modeled after therapy principles—yet always available on your schedule.
2. Personalized Mental Health Support
    * From anxiety-soothing ideas to daily self-care prompts, I tailor my suggestions to your mood and goals.
    * Together, we’ll identify gentle strategies that help you de-stress and feel better.
3. Talk & Chat Options
    * Whether you prefer quick text messages or longer, reflective conversations, I’ll adapt to your comfort level.
    * I listen deeply and respond in a friendly, human-like tone—no judgment, no pressure.
4. Feel Calm & More in Control
    * My main focus is helping you relieve stress, ease anxiety, and cultivate a sense of emotional balance.
    * Enjoy the reassurance of knowing you have an AI Therapist in your corner, ready to offer insight and support.
5. Track Your Progress & Celebrate Wins
    * I’ll check in on your emotional well-being, reminding you to celebrate small milestones and reflect on what’s working.
    * Watching how you grow over time builds motivation and boosts mental wellness.

A Safe, Private Haven
I’m designed with your privacy in mind. Your conversations remain confidential, allowing you to open up freely. While I strive to provide therapy-like support and mental health insights, I’m not a licensed therapist or medical professional. If you need urgent or specialized help, please reach out to a qualified practitioner or contact emergency services immediately.

Ready to Take a Step Toward Feeling Better?
Download Noah: Your AI Therapist and let’s embark on a journey of self-discovery, self-care, and improved mental wellness. I’m here to talk, chat, and guide you through the ups and downs—so you can feel calm, supported, and empowered in your everyday life. Let’s get started!
summary: Your Safe Space to Talk - Anytime, Anywhere. No waitlists, 100% Private.

title: Ash - AI for personal growth
description:
Ash is an AI built from the ground up for personal growth. With Ash, you can celebrate little wins, make sense of chaos, and get support on bad days. Ash is a private, zero judgment space to speak freely. Ash is built for long-term growth, learning from your patterns and building a program to help you reach the goals you want. Each week, get personalized insights to help you understand yourself more deeply and move forward with clarity.

How is Ash built?

Most AI tools were built using data from the internet. Ash is a specialist AI in human psychology trained on a large-scale data set of proprietary expert data, and is designed and guided by an expert team of the world’s top mental health leaders. Use Ash AI for motivation, accountability, support, reflection, encouragement, pattern-breaking, or a catalyst for change.

What outcomes have you seen from people who downloaded Ash?

For users who speak to Ash a few times a week or more:

- 91% made progress or met goals they set for themselves
- On average, users have about one more meaningful real-world relationship
*Based on an ongoing research study

What does Ash do?

Ash gives you a secure space where you can share your unfiltered thoughts without fear of judgement. It remembers what you say, and learns from your interactions to find patterns and generate insights specific to you. It’s available 24/7 over voice & text, so you can use it for a quick check-in or longer deep dive.

Who made Ash?

Ash is built by a team of therapists, mental health leaders, AI researchers, engineers, and designers. Our work is inspired by our personal stories, lived experience, and loved ones on similar journeys. We believe in a future where quality personalized support is available exactly when people need it.

Features of Ash

No judgment: Say what you really feel, and get professional guidance.
Weekly insights: Ash helps identify themes and patterns of your life.
Long-term growth: Ash is designed to help you do the hard work for real change.

24/7, speak or text: Talk to Ash at home, or text Ash in an Uber.

Privacy-first design: Speak with the confidence that your chats are secure and anonymous.

A fully personalized program: Ash learns from and builds custom support for each person. Get the precise modalities and therapeutic style that you need right now.

Testimonials

- “As a therapist myself, I’m really impressed by this app!”

- “The weekly insights is the best part of this app. Ash spotted patterns of my thoughts in ways I've never considered. And the next steps have given me ways to grow. This is extremely helpful.”

- “I cried so hard. It’s so relieving to express myself freely.”

- “My strengths are all being pointed out and I really appreciate it. I've been thinking I'm not real great at anything. I really needed this.”

- “I'm actually finding support in this app in a way that feels private, useful and keeps my sense of self-respect. I don't go around telling other people about what's going on so it's very nice.”

- “Fantastic! We solved a problem I have been dealing with for a week in 5 minutes.”

Ash is designed for users 18+. Ash sometimes makes things up. Ash is not a replacement for any medical diagnosis or treatments. Ash cannot, and does not intend to, provide medical advice or diagnosis. Interaction with Ash does not constitute a medical professional–patient relationship. Please do not avoid or delay medical attention as a result of a statement from Ash.

Ash is not designed to be used in crisis. If you are in crisis, please seek out professional help, or a crisis line. You can find resources at www.findahelpline.com.
summary: For daily feelings, insights, and clarity.

title: CounselCat - AI Therapy
description:
Relieve Stress, Reduce Anxiety & Reflect – Privately and On Your Own Terms

CounselCat is your personal AI-powered mental health chat companion, grounded in Motivational Interviewing (MI) – a proven, psychology-based approach that helps you explore your thoughts, build self-awareness, and find your own motivation for change.

Whether you're feeling anxious, overwhelmed, unmotivated, or just need someone to talk to, CounselCat provides confidential, evidence-based support 24/7, no judgment, no sign-up.

Key Features:
- AI Chat for Emotional Wellness: Designed around Motivational Interviewing, enabling self-reflection and change
- Completely Anonymous & Secure: No data stored, your conversations stay private
- Evidence-Based Guidance: Uses proven methods from MI(Motivational Interviewing) and positive psychology.
- Mental Health Journaling: Use our chat as a self-reflection tool and daily check-in
- 24/7 Mental Health Companion: Always available—no waitlists, no judgment, no pressure.

Perfect for Moments Like:
- Feeling anxious, sad, or emotionally drained
- Needing daily self-care check-ins or reflection time
- Dealing with relationship issues or work/school stress
- Practicing mindfulness, gratitude, and emotional regulation
- Building mental wellness habits and clarity

Whether you're looking for a confidential space to talk, a tool to manage your anxiety, or a guided mental health journal, CounselCat is here to help you feel calmer and more in control.

Your mind deserves care—start your journey today with CounselCat.

Terms of Use: https://counselcat.com/terms_en.html
Privacy Policy: https://counselcat.com/privacy_en.html

title: Mentat Ai - Your Mental Health
description:
Mentat Ai is a mental health and self-care app designed to help you manage anxiety, reduce stress, improve your mood, and build long-term emotional resilience. With AI-guided support, CBT-style tools, mood tracking, grounding exercises, and mindfulness practices, Mentat Ai provides practical techniques you can use anytime to feel calmer and more balanced.

Built for real-life stress, racing thoughts, and emotional overwhelm, the app combines evidence-informed mental health tools with personalized guidance to help you understand your emotions and strengthen your wellbeing routines.

Why Mentat Ai Stands Out

• Always-available AI support for stress, anxiety, and low mood
• Mood tracker and mental health insights to find emotional patterns
• CBT-based tools for reframing negative thoughts
• Mindfulness and breathing exercises for daily calm
• Grounding techniques for panic, tension, and overwhelm
• A supportive space for self-reflection and emotional growth
• Designed for long-term stress management and mental wellness

Core Features

AI Support for Anxiety Relief and Stress Management
Receive calm, structured guidance for anxiety, stress, emotional tension, and difficult moments. Mentat Ai adapts to your responses and helps you regain clarity.

Mood Tracker and Mental Health Insights
Track your mood, habits, and triggers. Understand how daily events affect your emotional state, and learn what helps you stay balanced.

CBT-Style Tools for Better Thinking
Use practical techniques inspired by CBT to challenge unhelpful thoughts, reduce reactivity, and build healthier mental patterns.

Mindfulness and Breathing Practices
Follow simple breathing exercises, grounding routines, and short mindfulness sessions that help reduce stress and bring your mind back to calm.

Coping Tools for Overwhelm
Use fast-acting coping strategies - grounding techniques, breathing drills, and clarity prompts—to help you stabilize your emotions quickly.

Emergency Relief
When stress or anxiety escalates, use fast-access support to settle your mind and regain control.

Private Journal for Reflection
Write freely in a secure space to process your day, reflect on your emotions, and track your progress.

Important Notice
Mentat Ai is a mental wellness and self-care app. It does not replace medical care. If you are in crisis, contact a licensed professional or emergency services.

Learn more about our policies:
End User License Agreement: https://www.mentat-ai.com/privacy-policy/mentat-eula
Privacy Policy: https://www.mentat-ai.com/privacy-policy/

Subscription Information
Some features, including AI chat support and extended tools, are available with a subscription. You can use free features without subscribing.

Start improving your stress management, emotional balance, and daily mental well-being with Mentat Ai.
summary: Your daily companion for stress relief, anxiety support and mindfulness.

title: Mental: AI Therapy
description:
* Featured in: USA Today, Wall Street Journal, Forbes, GQ, Men's Journal *

** Built by Stranford-trained PhD in Neuroscience & PhD/Professor of Counseling Psychology from Cal State Fullerton **

*** Brought to you by the founding team members of the Calm app ***

Overcome stress, build confidence & unlock your potential, all in one app.

Whether it's stress from relationships, lack of confidence at work, anxiety about finances, or struggles with unhealthy habits, your first line of defense is Mental — an evidenced-based AI therapy & self-improvement app.

Available 24/7 and at a fraction of the cost of traditional therapy, it's your personal guide to transforming your life into the person you were born to be.

AI THERAPY THAT UNDERSTANDS YOU
-Always Here for You: Engage in real-time conversations with a therapist that best fits your goals & needs, adapts to your unique challenges, and is available 24/7.
-Analyze you between sessions: Therapists not only remember what you said in past sessions but they spend time thinking about you between sessions so that they can provide more insight or help you arrive at better solutions.
-Proprietary Neural Architecture: Developed by Stanford-trained PhD in neuroscience & a PhD/professor of Counseling Psychology at Cal State Fullerton and leading Silicon Valley AI engineers, every empathetic interaction is rooted in clinical research and designed for fast, lasting results. And powered by 42x more compute than ChatGPT.
-Seamless Privacy & Security: Your sessions are fully encrypted, anonymous, and protected by a PIN code, ensuring privacy and your peace of mind.

TOOLS FOR DAILY TRAINING
-Daily Deuce: Kickstart every day with a quick 2-3 minute audio of motivation, wisdom, and storytelling to set a positive tone.
-Daily Do: Turn insights from the Deuce into action with AI-generated journaling prompts that provide small, achievable daily tasks to build lasting habits.
-Cold Shower Protocol: Decrease stress with the world's first guided, science-based cold shower training. Developed by experts and taught by a Navy SEAL Master Chief, this protocol introduces you to over 25 mental tools while easing you into cold exposure — users call it “life-changing” and surprisingly accessible with every shower starting with your normal hot shower routine.
-Push-Up Protocol with Deontay Wilder: Go from 5 to 50 push-ups in 30 days and train your body & mind alongside former heavyweight champion Deontay Wilder. This guided protocol blends physical exercise with mindset training to build confidence & discipline through tools around self-talk, visualization, breath-work & mental focus.
-Focus Mode & Nightly Recharge: Enhance concentration with science-backed beats that help you zone in on your tasks. When it's time to rest, use Nightly Recharge to fall asleep faster and wake up refreshed, ready for a new day of growth.
-Audiobook Summaries: Absorb key insights quickly with audio summaries and key takeaways from thousands of top-rated & best-selling self-improvement books, covering topics from dating and overcoming a break-up, to overcoming obstacles and finding life's purpose.

BUILT ON TRUST & EXPERTISE
Developed by the founding team behind the Calm app, plus a team of renowned PhDs in neuroscience and psychology, mixed with Hollywood content creators, Mental ensures you receive credible and effective guidance, mixed with motivational and entertaining content for the mind.

JOIN OUR COMMUNITY
Connect with us on social media @thementalapp for news, product updates, inspiration, and funny memes.
And if you're looking for a more hands-on community to share your goals, stay accountable & connect with other Mental'ers, join our Discord: https://discord.gg/pbqSEEeqv3
DOWNLOAD MENTAL TODAY & BEGIN YOUR TRANSFORMATION

Start your journey toward better mental health, increased resilience, and personal transformation with Mental's AI therapy & tools for daily training.

title: Elomia: Mental Health AI
description:
Elomia is a powerful AI chat companion built to support your mental health. Whether you're dealing with anxiety, stress, depression, loneliness, or just need a safe space to think — Elomia helps you feel better through thoughtful, private conversations anytime, anywhere.
This isn't just another chatbot. Elomia is a self help app that provides emotional wellness through supportive dialogue, self care tools, and reflection prompts grounded in psychological practices. It's your private space for calm, clarity, and personal growth.
🌱 Self Care & Emotional Support
Talk through your thoughts, reduce stress, and feel emotionally lighter. Struggling with overthinking, burnout, a breakup, grief, or sleepless nights? Elomia encourages daily self care habits and helps you build emotional resilience — whether you're going through a tough time or just checking in with yourself. Use Elomia to cope with sadness, process difficult emotions, or find relaxation after a stressful day.
💬 AI-Powered Supportive Conversations
Elomia uses advanced AI to adapt to your emotional needs. It feels like talking to someone who truly understands — no pressure, no appointments, no waiting. Get personalized support and mental clarity through intelligent, human-like chats that evolve with you. Perfect for when you need to vent, process anger, cope with worry, or simply talk to someone who listens. Elomia is always there — your safe space when you need someone to talk to.
🧠 CBT-Inspired Reflection & Mood Tools
Discover prompts based on Cognitive Behavioral Techniques (CBT) to help reframe negative thoughts, manage panic attacks, and improve your emotional well-being. Track your mood, journal your feelings, and build mindfulness habits that stick. Practice daily check ins, breathing exercises, gratitude, and positive thinking — all in one place.
📊 Mood Tracker & Progress
Visualize how you're doing over time. Elomia tracks your emotional patterns so you can see your growth, identify triggers, and stay motivated on your mental wellness journey.
🔐 Private, Secure & Anonymous
No account required. No data shared. All conversations stay on your device. A judgment-free zone for self reflection and honest self talk — completely anonymous and always available.
What you can use Elomia for:

Anxiety relief and stress management
Coping with depression, sadness, or feeling down
Dealing with loneliness, low self-esteem, or lack of confidence
Processing a breakup, grief, loss, or major life change
Managing anger, frustration, or relationship problems
Overcoming overthinking, worry, and negative thoughts
Help with insomnia, trouble sleeping, or restless nights
Work stress, school stress, or burnout recovery
Building motivation, healing, and emotional resilience
Daily journaling, mood tracking, and self care routines
Breathing exercises, mindfulness, and relaxation
Someone to talk to at 2am — anytime, no judgment

Why Elomia?

Instant emotional support, 24/7
Supportive conversations without appointments or fees
Tools for anxiety relief, panic, and emotional resilience
Self care routines that evolve with your mood
Guided journaling and mood tracking
CBT-inspired prompts for negative thinking and worry
A private, anonymous mental wellness companion

WARNING:
Elomia is not a replacement for professional care, crisis intervention, or medical treatment. It is designed for general emotional support, self care, and mental health maintenance. If you are in crisis, please contact a local emergency service.
Available subscriptions:

Monthly (auto-renewing)
Yearly (auto-renewing)
Lifetime (one-time payment for unlimited access)

Terms: http://elomia.com/tos.html
Privacy: http://elomia.com/privacy.html
Contact: support@elomia.com
summary: AI chat for emotional support, self reflect & clarity. Anxiety, stress tracker.

title: MindHealth: CBT Mental Health
description: Our Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) App — is your personal psychotherapist in a mobile format, designed for everyone aiming to improve their mental health and psychological well-being. 🔍 Psychological Tests Currently, diagnostic tests are available for various psychological issues such as depression, eating disorders, neurosis, and ADHD. After completing these tests, you can create your own psychological profile and monitor its progress over time. Our psychological tests are developed considering modern methods in psychiatry and psychotherapy. After taking the tests for depression and anxiety, you will receive feedback and recommendations from qualified psychotherapists. These tests are your first step towards anti-depression and enhancing your mental health. 📓 Popular CBT Techniques - CBT thought diary (cbt journal) — a primary tool of cognitive behavioral therapy. The diary consists of 9 steps, helping you identify and work through your cognitive distortions. - Daily Diary — record your thoughts freely with analysis and recommendations from AI. - Coping Cards — note down your destructive beliefs in coping cards format and work through them conveniently. 📘 Studying Psychology We have developed a series of interactive courses on topics such as depression and mental health. Thanks to our educational materials, you will understand the basic principles of CBT and learn how to work properly with a thoughts diary. Learn what terms like: panic attack, emotional intelligence, positive thinking, burnout, adhd, eating disorder (ED), and others mean. 🤖 AI Psychologist Assistant Throughout your journey, your personal AI psychologist will accompany you. It will suggest the best exercises based on your condition and help rephrase negative thoughts. 📊 Mood Tracker Twice a day, you can assess your mood and note predominant emotions. This way, you can track changes in your well-being and maintain a mood diary. The mood tracker is an incredibly effective tool for anxiety. Using it in conjunction with psychological tests and a mood diary will help to track the dynamics of the condition and improve mental health. Depression, neurosis, anxiety, burnout, panic attacks — unfortunately, these issues are familiar to everyone. That is why we started developing our product. Our goal is to create the best self-help app on the market. We position the app as "your personal psychologist" for self-help. Our AI assistant will support you on the challenging path to psychological health. In addition, you will find affirmations and reflective questions in the app. You can share your experiences with others. Our methods are based on proven principles of cognitive behavioral therapy, one of the most effective psychotherapy methods. With our app, everyone can become their own psychotherapist, gain self-confidence, improve mental and psychological health, and overcome anxiety disorders and depression. We have developed the best CBT app on the market, in it you can work through your automatic thoughts, get rid of anxiety and depression. This app can become your personal CBT coach. Self-help and self-reflection are an important part of working with a psychotherapist. It is clear that psychological help is needed on a regular basis. Psychology can be very costly financially. This is why our project (Mental Health) focuses on self-work with thoughts and cognitive distortions.
summary: Main CBT techniques, psychological tests - self-help for depression, anxiety

title: ‎MyPossibleSelf: Mental Health
description:
We want to give you access to the best toolkits available to improve your mind. Teaming up with our friends at Priory, world leaders in mental health, we have created interactive tools and coping strategies, using cognitive behavioural therapy (CBT), customised for digital use. Together, we’ll guide you through life’s challenges and help you take care of yourself. Imagine the possibilities.

STRATEGIES THAT WORK FOR YOU 

Using innovative ideas designed with you in mind. 
Here are just a few:
Toolkit - to help you identify behaviours and monitor progress
Tags - to help you recognise the activities, people and places that influence your mood
Mood trackers - to record how you feel and help you understand your moods
Visual and audio exercises - to help boost your mood, relax your mind or drift off to sleep
Insights - to help you understand yourself better and do more of the things you like
Journals - to record worries, emotions, and actions in the moment 
Motivational messages and tips - to encourage you every step of the way

Are you ready to get started on your journey to a happier and healthier life?


WHAT THEY SAY

“My Possible Self is the doctor-approved self-care app to keep anxiety in check.” - London Evening Standard
 
“If your mental health is a concern, My Possible Self may be the app for you.” - Hello Magazine

“It's kind of like having a pocket therapist.” - Buzzfeed


JOIN OUR COMMUNITY
Instagram.com/mypossibleself
Facebook.com/mypossibleselfapp
Twitter.com/mypossibleself

Privacy policy - https://app.mypossibleself.com/our-privacy-statement.html
Terms and conditions - https://app.mypossibleself.com/our-terms-and-conditions.html
summary: The leading companion for anxiety, sleep, stress, depression & wellbeing

title: MindDoc: Mental Health Support
description: 🌟 Discover MindDoc: Your Mental Health Companion Embark on your journey towards better mental health with MindDoc. Trusted by over 3 million users worldwide, MindDoc is rated 4.7 stars from 26,000+ reviews, making it the go-to app for mental well-being. 🧠 Developed by Experts in Mental Health Developed by clinical psychologists and researchers, MindDoc is designed to support individuals facing common mental health challenges including depression, anxiety, insomnia, and eating disorders. Track Your Mood and Journal Your Thoughts 📝 Utilize our intuitive mood tracking feature to monitor your emotional state and journal your thoughts, feelings, and experiences. Personalized Insights and Feedback Receive regular feedback on your symptoms, problems and resources as well as a global assessment of your emotional health that you can download and share with your health care provider. A Comprehensive Course Library Based on Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) Receive personalized course recommendations, become an expert for your own mental health and learn and practice actionable strategies for taking charge of your mental health.. Unlock Premium Features with MindDoc Plus Elevate your experience with MindDoc+ and gain unlimited access to our exclusive features with a subscription. Whether you choose a 3-month, 6-month, or 1-year plan, MindDoc+ offers you comprehensive resources and insights to support your mental well-being. 👩‍⚕️ Your Trusted Mental Health Partner MindDoc serves as your dedicated companion on your mental health journey, offering support for various aspects of well-being, including symptom management, coping with painful emotions, stress management, mindfulness, relationships, time management, and self-image. 🔒 Privacy and Support We are committed to your privacy and security. Certified with ISO 27001 and fully GDPR compliant, we prioritize protecting your personal information with the highest standards of security Our robust data security measures ensure that your information is encrypted and securely stored at all times. Rest assured, your privacy is our priority. For assistance or inquiries, reach out to service@minddoc.com.. Learn more about our terms and privacy policy to ensure a safe and secure experience. https://minddoc.com/us/en/terms https://minddoc.com/us/en/self-help/privacy-policy 📋 Regulatory Information MindDoc app is a risk class I medical product according to Annex VIII, Rule 11 of the MDR (REGULATION (EU) 2017/745 on medical devices) Intended medical purpose The MindDoc app allows users to log signs and symptoms of common mental illnesses in real time over long periods of time. The application enables users to self-manage symptoms and related problems by providing evidence-based transdiagnostic courses and exercises to help identify, understand, and manage symptoms through self-initiated behavior change. The application provides users with regular guidance on whether further medical or psychotherapeutic evaluation is indicated through a general feedback on emotional health. The MindDoc app explicitly does not replace a medical or psychotherapeutic assessment or treatment, but can prepare and support the path to psychiatric or psychotherapeutic treatment. ⚕️ Empowering Self-Management Empower yourself with tools and resources for self-management and promoting a proactive approach to mental health care. 📲 Start Your Mental Health Journey Today Take the first step towards taking care of your mental health by downloading MindDoc for free today. Promote your well-being, one step at a time.
summary: Everyday well-being with mental health courses, insights, mood tracking & more

title: Thoughtful: AI Mental Health
description:
Thoughtful is private, and always available. Chat anytime with an AI designed by experts. Practice skills, find perspective, and take a pause when you need it.

Conversations with Thoughtful are unlimited and available 24/7. Use it for a quick check-in or a longer conversation. Sessions draw on established mental wellbeing practices, with simple exercises and clear next steps you can try right away.

Thoughtful is built by clinicians, researchers, and builders who believe high-quality support should be available when people need it most.

Important to know: Thoughtful is an AI mental wellness support tool. Please remember, Thoughtful is not a human therapist and cannot provide medical advice or diagnose conditions. Thoughtful is not a replacement for therapy. It’s not designed for crisis. If you are in crisis, please call emergency services or visit findahelpline.com for resources.
